title: aetheilema glutinosum
intro: Aetheilema glutinosum, also known as the sticky bush or slippery bush, is a plant species native to Australia, characterized by its sticky leaves and stems. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Aetheilema glutinosum include the potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress, among others. Aetheilema glutinosum can be prepared as a herbal remedy, typically in the form of a tincture or infusion, to harness its medicinal properties.
